home.description.message: IT guide for solving problems after power outages.

home.kicker.message: Internal IT guide · support for end users

home.summary.message: Simple instructions to help company users resolve issues after power outages, without needing technical knowledge.

home.cards.whatItSolves.body.message: Power, connectivity, and device response issues after a power outage.

home.cards.howToUse.body.message: First the docking station, then the laptop, and finally IT support if the issue continues.

homepageFeatures.title.message: The essentials for fixing issues after a power outage

homepageFeatures.intro.message: This documentation is designed so that any user can follow it without technical knowledge.

homepageFeatures.guideCards.intro.descri.message: Overview of when to use these instructions and when to escalate to support.

homepageFeatures.guideCards.docking.desc.message: Simple steps to restore monitors, USB, and network after a power outage.
